title_zh: 利用NVIDIA GQE设计GPU加速查询引擎
title_en: Designing GPU-Accelerated Query Engines with NVIDIA GQE
summary_zh: GPU加速查询引擎通常受限于内存和I/O带宽。NVIDIA硬件的进步——包括高带宽内存（HBM）和NVIDIA的专有技术——正在推动查询引擎性能的提升。
summary_en: GPU-accelerated query engines are often constrained by memory and I/O bandwidth. Advances in NVIDIA hardware—including high bandwidth memory (HBM) and NVIDIA's proprietary technologies—are enhancing query engine performance.
why_it_matters_zh: NVIDIA GQE提供了优化GPU资源利用的方案，帮助开发者突破传统带宽限制，提高查询处理效率。
why_it_matters_en: NVIDIA GQE offers solutions for optimizing GPU resource usage, helping developers overcome traditional bandwidth limitations and improve query processing efficiency.

title_zh: NVIDIA BioNeMo Agent 工具包助力生命科学研究者加速人工智能应用于 Claude Science
title_en: NVIDIA BioNeMo Agent Toolkit Brings Accelerated AI to Life Sciences Researchers in Claude Science
summary_zh: 生命科学进入了大规模计算时代。十多年来，NVIDIA构建了完整的GPU加速计算栈，包括硬件、框架、库、模型、微服务和领域专用工具，帮助研究人员运行更复杂的工作流程并加快迭代速度。本周，Anthropic发布了科学人工智能工作台Claude Science，集成了NVIDIA BioNeMo Agent工具包，促进生命科学领域的AI创新。
summary_en: Life sciences has entered an era of computational scale. For over a decade, NVIDIA has developed a full GPU-accelerated computing stack—covering hardware, frameworks, libraries, models, microservices, and domain-specific tools—to enable researchers to run sophisticated workflows and accelerate iterations. This week, Anthropic announced Claude Science, an AI workbench for science that incorporates NVIDIA's BioNeMo Agent Toolkit to empower life sciences researchers with accelerated AI capabilities.
why_it_matters_zh: 该工具包整合于Claude Science中，展示了NVIDIA在推动生命科学人工智能领域创新的实力，帮助研究者利用GPU加速技术实现更高效研究。
why_it_matters_en: The integration of this toolkit into Claude Science highlights NVIDIA's role in advancing AI innovations in life sciences, enabling researchers to leverage GPU acceleration for more efficient scientific workflows.

title_zh: NVIDIA推理软件栈降低每个Token成本的秘密
title_en: How NVIDIA’s Inference Software Stack Powers the Lowest Token Cost
summary_zh: 随着组织从AI试点走向生产级AI工厂，基础设施关注点已从最高芯片规格转向每个Token成本，即每美元、每瓦特以及在所需延迟目标内能提供多少有用Token。NVIDIA推理软件与其GPU、CPU、网络和系统共同设计，并得益于广泛的开源生态系统，使得这一目标成为可能。
summary_en: As organizations transition from AI pilots to production AI factories, infrastructure priorities have shifted from peak chip specs to cost per token—how many useful tokens can be delivered per dollar, per watt, and within latency targets. NVIDIA’s inference software, co-designed with their GPUs, CPUs, networking, and systems, and supported by a broad open-source ecosystem, enables achieving this goal.
why_it_matters_zh: 随着AI应用普及，降低推理成本对于大规模部署至关重要。NVIDIA通过软硬件协同优化，帮助企业高效且经济地部署AI解决方案，推动AI工业化进程。
why_it_matters_en: As AI adoption grows, reducing inference costs is crucial for large-scale deployment. NVIDIA’s integrated software and hardware optimizations assist businesses in deploying AI solutions efficiently and economically, advancing AI industrialization.

title_zh: 通过保留选择实现递归自我进化代理
title_en: Recursive Self-Evolving Agents via Held-Out Selection
summary_zh: 本文提出了递归自我进化代理（RSEA），该代理使用紧凑的三层自然语言状态（策略、技能和流程手册），通过自身轨迹递归重写并利用保留选择机制仅在不退化时更新。研究在ALFWorld、GAIA、(τ)-bench和WebShop四个基准及六个基线方法上进行，结果显示没有普适最佳方案，但RSEA在多个任务中表现出较强稳定性和安全性，避免了无保护上下文演化带来的波动和性能崩溃。
summary_en: This paper introduces Recursive Self-Evolving Agent (RSEA), which maintains a compact three-layer natural-language state—imperative strategy, reusable skills, and procedural playbook—and recursively rewrites these layers from its own trajectories. By employing a strict hold-out selection gate, RSEA only commits updates that do not regress on separate held-out data, ensuring monotone-safe recursive self-evolution. Evaluations across four benchmarks and six baselines show no universal winner, but RSEA achieves strong and stable performance, avoiding the instability and performance collapse seen in unguarded context evolution methods.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究通过严格的保留选择机制，实现了递归自我进化过程的单调安全，保证代理在所有基准测试中表现不会显著下降，解决了上下文在线演化中存在的不稳定性和潜在崩溃问题，在多样任务上的可靠性具有重要意义。
why_it_matters_en: The study achieves monotone-safe recursive self-evolution by applying a strict hold-out selection mechanism, ensuring that the agent's performance never significantly worsens across benchmarks. This addresses the instability and potential collapse seen in unguarded online context evolution, providing robust reliability across diverse tasks.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Recursive Self-Evolving Agents via Held-Out Selection. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 74.

title_zh: 通过伦理困境对大型语言模型进行亚里士多德美德分析
title_en: Aristotelian Virtue Profiling of LLMs through Ethical Dilemmas
summary_zh: arXiv发布了一篇新论文，介绍了VirtueMap框架，该框架通过亚里士多德美德伦理学视角评估大型语言模型（LLMs）在伦理困境中的行为表现。VirtueMap让人类或LLM对七类一般性且非致命、非政治、非宗教的伦理困境的五种回应进行排序，从而在实践智慧、公正、诚信、勇气和节制五种美德维度上进行评分。研究收集了超过100个评估者的数据以确认排序的准确性，并在九个LLM家族中进行了测试，展示了约90.3%的高排序一致性，同时发现在勇气、节制和公正方面存在较大差异。此外，研究团队发布了一个交互式网站，允许用户在浏览器中本地计算和比较LLM的美德画像。
summary_en: A new paper on arXiv presents VirtueMap, a framework that profiles Large Language Models (LLMs) using Aristotelian virtue ethics to assess their responses to ethical dilemmas. Rather than selecting a single correct answer, VirtueMap asks humans or LLMs to rank five different responses to seven general, non-lethal, non-political, and non-religious dilemmas. These rankings are evaluated across five virtues: Practical Wisdom, Justice, Truthfulness, Courage, and Temperance. The paper reports over 100 respondent evaluations per ordering, with at least 95% agreement to establish ground truth. Testing on nine LLM families showed high mean rank consistency (~90.3%) but noted differences in Courage, Temperance, and Justice. An interactive website is provided for local profiling and comparison of LLMs.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究创新地将亚里士多德的美德伦理学应用于AI模型评估，提供了多维度且细致的伦理表现分析方法，超越了单一正误判断，帮助理解和提升LLM的伦理特点。提供的交互式工具也便于研究者和用户直观比较不同模型的伦理倾向。
why_it_matters_en: This work innovatively applies Aristotelian virtue ethics to AI evaluation, offering a multidimensional and nuanced approach to assessing ethical behavior beyond simple right-wrong judgments. It aids in understanding and improving LLMs' ethical characteristics. The interactive tool further facilitates transparent comparison of different models' virtue profiles for researchers and users.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Aristotelian Virtue Profiling of LLMs through Ethical Dilemmas. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 68.

title_zh: 低成本基于概念的局部解释：无训练方法能走多远？
title_en: Low-cost Concept-based Localized Explanations: How Far Can We Get with Training-free Approaches?
summary_zh: 本文评估了中等规模的多模态大型语言模型（MLLM）在严格零样本条件下，对局部区域进行概念命名的能力。通过封闭集类别限制提示和基于嵌入相似度的策略，实验在四个MLLM模型和多个数据集上取得了62%-88%的对象级准确率，展示了无训练概念注释的潜力。
summary_en: This paper evaluates mid-scale Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) in strict zero-shot settings for localized concept naming via closed-set prompting and embedding similarity strategies. Experiments on four MLLMs demonstrate 62%-88% object-level exact-match accuracy, showing the promise of training-free concept annotation from localized regions.
why_it_matters_zh: 由于缺乏细粒度概念注释，基于概念的可解释AI面临验证挑战。该研究提供了一个低成本且无训练的框架，促进了未来C-XAI的研究与应用。
why_it_matters_en: Limited fine-grained annotations constrain C-XAI validation. This work offers a low-cost, training-free framework that advances concept-based explainability and supports future research in C-XAI.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Low-cost Concept-based Localized Explanations: How Far Can We Get with Training-free Approaches?. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 65.

title_zh: 多模态大语言模型能像人类一样进行审美批评吗？评估开放式审美推理
title_en: Can MLLMs Critique Like Humans? Evaluating Open-Ended Aesthetic Reasoning in Multimodal Large Language Models
summary_zh: 本文评估了多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在开放式审美批评中的表现，发现参考基准相似度评测误导性较大，模型的批评与人类存在显著差异，如文本冗长且重复。模型更倾向于全面且流畅的批评风格，而非人类的选择性和具体性。
summary_en: This work evaluates the performance of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in open-ended aesthetic critique, revealing that reference-based similarity metrics can be misleading. Models' critiques differ notably from humans, being longer, more repetitive, and less selective. They favor a fluent, comprehensive style over the specificity and selectivity seen in human critiques.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究揭示了当前评价多模态生成模型审美能力的方法局限，提醒我们在训练和评估开放式多模态生成时需考虑人类批评的选择性和具体性，而非仅依赖表面相似度。
why_it_matters_en: The study highlights limitations of current multimodal model evaluation methods in assessing aesthetic critique ability, emphasizing the need to account for human-like selectivity and specificity rather than just surface-level similarity when training and evaluating open-ended multimodal generation.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Can MLLMs Critique Like Humans? Evaluating Open-Ended Aesthetic Reasoning in Multimodal Large Language Models. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 65.
